feedback: Adequate customer support. Meets basic expectations.
5G speeds are impressive in my area. Very fast downloads.
The network has been unstable for months. Frequent call drops and poor coverage in my locality. Not what I signed up for.

Network drops in the elevator but works fine everywhere else in the building. Call quality on the terrace is excellent though. I'd rate the overall experience as good with minor inconveniences that I can live with.
Recharge plan benefits are mediocre at best for the price point.
SIM took too long to activate. Lost three days of productivity.
Strong signal everywhere in my city. Never drops calls.

I appreciate the effort they put into the mobile app experience. Everything from SIM activation tracking to data balance monitoring to OTT bundle management is handled in one place. The interface is modern and responsive. Only wish the customer support chat was faster.
OTT bundle with the plan is standard. Has the basic apps covered.
Recharge plan is adequate for basic usage. Standard offering.

ur mobile app is completely broken on ios. crashes when i try to reacharg, shows wrong data balance, and the ott bundle activation links lead to error pages. been like this for 2 weeks since the last update. plz fix this immediately. i shouldnt have to use the website for basic account management

I find it unacceptable that the OTT bundle randomly deactivates every time my recharge renews requiring manual re-authentication on every streaming platform. This tedious process takes thirty minutes each cycle and customer support says it is by design. For a feature marketed as seamless and automatic this is anything but.
SIM activation timeline was acceptable. Standard 48 hours.

custmer care was helpful in resolving my data balance prblm. they credited back the wrongly deducted amount within 24 hours. internet speed also seems to have improved after they reset something on their end
plz fix ur intrenet speed. very slow since last week.
It does the job. Nothing to say really.
Recharge plan options are adequate. Standard market rates.

ur support is the only reason i stay with this carrier tbh. network could be better and pricing is average but whenever i have a prblm the custmer care team actually fixes it properly. rare for telecom companies

I had a billing dispute of 500 rupees and customer support not only resolved it on the first call but also provided a complimentary data voucher as goodwill. This kind of proactive customer retention effort makes me want to stay with this carrier long term.

I want to appreciate the genuine value for money the 84-day recharge plan provides. At 699 rupees with 2GB daily data, unlimited calls, three OTT platforms, and consistent network performance it represents the most economical choice for my moderate usage pattern. Billing is clean and data balance tracking is accurate.
Roaming experience is neither good nor bad. Just standard service.
plz make the app work on older android versions. my phone runs android 9 and the latest update doesnt support it anymore. forcing custmers to buy new phones just to manage their account is wrong
Call quality for business use is terrible. Network cuts out during video conferences regularly.

5G network coverage in the tech park is exceptional. All my colleagues have switched and are happy with the call quality and data speeds. The only downside is the premium pricing but for corporate users it's justified.
Customer support response time is acceptable. Standard process.
omg worst custmer care experience. agent was rude and unhelpful. asked me to call back later when i already waited 20 mins. never again
Data validity is fine for monthly plans. No issues there.

Data balance keeps disappearing overnight even when I am not using the phone. Something is seriously wrong with how they calculate usage. I checked my background apps and nothing explains the drain. Very frustrating to wake up with zero balance every morning.
Roaming data is expensive but the speeds are good when it works.
No value for money whatsoever. Complete waste of my budget.
5G signal is present at my home. Not sure it makes a huge difference yet.

The OTT bundle is a great differentiator for this carrier. I was going to switch but the included streaming subscriptions tipped the value proposition in their favor. Combined with decent internet speed and reliable coverage it becomes a compelling overall package.

omg the billing is completely wrong this month. charged 200 extra for services i never subscribed to. custmer care says they will investigate but nothing happens. data balance also shows incorrect numbers. what a mess
Excellent network coverage, fast internet speed, and clear call quality.
Data validity is what it is. Standard 28 days.
No signal in my office building. Frustrating.

Customer support agent was patient and helped me set up my 5G connection properly. I was struggling with the APN settings and she walked me through each step until everything was working perfectly. Appreciated the extra effort on a technical issue.
cant blv the roaming charges on my bill. activated pack through app but was charged separately for incoming calls which was never mentioned anywhere. hidden charges everywhere. v bad transparency
5G finally launched here but it keeps dropping back to 4G. Disappointing rollout.

ur app is terrible for managing roaming. tried to activate international pack but it kept failing. had to call custmer care who also struggled. by the time it was sorted i was already abroad without data for half a day
The 5G upgrade was genuinely worth it. Streaming and calls both improved significantly since switching.
Network coverage in the city is adequate. Calls are standard quality.
plz reduce the pricing on ur plans. everything is too costly now. even the basic plan costs 149 for just 14 days validity. not sustainable for students

Excellent customer support experience resolving my billing concern. Agent was knowledgeable and reversed the incorrect charges immediately. Also helped me find a better recharge plan with improved OTT access and longer data validity. Everything handled in one call.
ngl the ott bundle makes this plan worth it. getting prime and netflix free with my recharge saves me like 500 bucks a month. solid value for money
cant blv they charge so much and the 5g doesnt even work properly in most areas. total waste of money
Fast 5G and excellent call quality. Worth the premium.

Customer support email response came within 4 hours which is reasonable. The agent addressed all three of my questions about network coverage in my new area, recommended the best plan for my usage, and even provided a direct number for future escalations. Very thorough.
Great value for money. Plan covers all my daily needs.

Thank you so much for the excellent customer support experience where I was put on hold for 45 minutes only to be told to restart my phone. Truly innovative problem-solving that I could not have thought of myself. Worth every second of the wait.
SIM activation was quick and hassle-free. Done in under an hour.

I love how the mobile app crashes right when I need to recharge urgently. The timing is always impeccable. It is like the app knows when I am desperate and chooses that exact moment to stop functioning. Brilliant engineering.

Smooth SIM activation process through the retail store. The staff helped me choose the right recharge plan for my usage pattern and even activated the OTT bundle on the spot. Was making calls within 30 minutes of walking in. Professional and efficient onboarding experience.

intrenet speed drops to absolutely nothing after 8pm every single day without fail. this has been happening for 6 weeks straight. clearly the tower in my area is overloaded and they refuse to upgrade it. paying premium pricing for what amounts to a 2G experience during the hours i actually need connectivity the most
I travel frequently and roaming coverage is solid. Call quality abroad is acceptable. Pricing is average for international packs. App activation is smooth. Data balance tracking works.

Since moving to the new city the network coverage here is adequate. Signal strength is present in most areas including underground metro stations. Call quality is clear and internet speed is consistent throughout the day. Standard connectivity experience for a metro city.

The value for money here is extraordinary if you define value as paying more for less every quarter. They have truly mastered the art of reducing benefits while increasing prices. A masterclass in how to lose customer loyalty.
I travel a lot for work and the roaming experience is seamless. Call quality remains consistent whether I'm in metro cities or smaller towns. Very reliable network overall.
intrenet speed is great and the ott bundle makes the plan worth every rupee. streaming in hd without any buffering even during peak hours. best reacharg plan i have used from any carrier honestly
No 5G in my area yet. Waiting for rollout.

The overall mobile app experience continues to be a strong point for this carrier. From plan management to bill payment to OTT access to customer support chat, everything is unified in one well-designed interface. The recent addition of a data usage heatmap showing which apps consume most data has been particularly enlightening.
5G average. Internet speed and network coverage nothing special.

The OTT bundle integration with my recharge plan has been a genuine value-add for my family's entertainment needs. Having Netflix, Prime, and Hotstar included saves us nearly 500 rupees monthly compared to subscribing individually. The streaming quality is good thanks to the reliable internet speed on our connection.
Data balance notification feature in the app is very helpful. Easy to track usage.
v bad experience with support. agent kept transferring me between departments. no one wanted to own my network coverage complaint. wasted one full hour of my day for nothing

Roaming experience in Europe was seamless with good call quality throughout. The data validity on the international pack lasted my entire trip and the pricing was transparent with no hidden charges on the final bill. Very satisfied with every aspect of the service abroad.
tbh ok pricing but nothing that makes this carrier stand out from the crowd. recharge plans are similar to what everyone else offers. billing works fine at least so thats a plus

The irony of their customer support line dropping calls while you are trying to report call quality issues is not lost on me. It is like calling the fire department and having the phone catch fire. Poetic really. At least it gives you perspective.
cant blv the custmer support agent hung up on me. i was asking about my billing prblm and he just disconnected. absolutely disgraceful behavior
v bad custmer service. agent told me my complaint was registered but when i called back next day they said no record exists. had to start all over again. total waste of time

The value for money on this network is acceptable. Pricing is in line with what competitors charge and the recharge plans cover the basics I need. Nothing exceptional but also nothing to complain about. A middling experience overall.
The intrenet speed on 5G is amazng. I download movies in seconds now. Totally worth the extra cost for the premium plan.
intrenet speed terrible since they upgraded tower in my area. ironic. also data balance draining faster than before. custmer support says its normal usage which is clearly not true. very prblmatic

The mobile app notification system is excellent. It alerts me before my data runs out, reminds me about upcoming recharge dates, and even notified me about a network maintenance window in my area. Very well implemented push notification strategy.
omg they downgraded the ott bundle on my plan without any notice. used to have 5 apps now only 3. same price fewer benefits. custmer care says its a policy change. terrible treatment of loyal users

custmer care told me sim activation would take 24 hrs. its been 72 hrs now and still nothing. no update no callback. the app shows pending status with no explanation. absolutely terrible onboarding for a new custmer

The recharge plans are well-structured and easy to compare through the app. I can see exactly what each tier offers in terms of data, validity, and OTT access. This transparency helps me pick the right plan for my needs without confusion or regret after purchase.

The 5G coverage in airports and malls is impressive. I can make HD video calls without any lag and the browsing experience is seamless. However the pricing for the 5G tier feels steep compared to what competitors offer.
Good internet speed and reliable network. Satisfied customer.
prblm with mobile app. crashes every time I open it.
Happy with 5G performance. Meets my expectations for the price I pay.
Call quality on this network is okay. Nothing special.
Data validity. Exists. Expires. Repeat.
Data balance drains fast. Internet speed also very poor.

Recently moved to a tier 2 city and was pleasantly surprised by the 5G availability here. The tower density seems good as I get consistent signal strength at home and office. Internet speeds hover around 500 Mbps which is more than enough for my needs.
Data balance accurate. App tracking and billing both correct.

Network coverage is terrible and customer support refuses to acknowledge the problem. Called three times about dropped calls in my area and each time they just say reset your phone. Meanwhile billing keeps charging me full price for a service I can barely use.
cant blv the recharge plan got worse again. same 299 plan now gives 1.5gb instead of 2gb. data validity also cut from 28 to 24 days. and they wonder why people switch. omg worst value ever
prblm with billing every single month. last 3 months i have been overcharged and have to call each time to get correction. this is unacceptable for a major carrier. fix ur systems
Average customer support. Nothing special about the interaction.
intrenet speed terrible and pricing too high for such bad service. not getting any value for the money i spend every month. worst carrier i have used
plz add jio cinema to the ott bundle. everyone has it except u guys. the current bundle feels incomplete without a sports streaming option. would make the plan much better value

I would write a detailed review but the internet speed is so slow that this page might time out before I finish typing. Let me just say that the experience matches the low expectations I had coming in. The network coverage is equally inspiring.
5G coverage is patchy. Only works in specific locations.
Recharge plan is adequate for my basic needs. Standard offering.
Data validity too short. Only 24 days for the price.
Happy with customer support. Quick resolution on first call.
Customer support is average. Nothing remarkable about the experience.
Fast internet and good coverage combination. Solid carrier overall.
SIM activation through the app was standard. Normal digital process.

custmer support helped me find a better reacharg plan with more data balance and longer validity. also explained the ott bundle options clearly. saved me money while getting better benefits. rare good experience
Value for the price is standard. Streaming services are a basic inclusion now.
Data balance is fine. No unexpected deductions noticed lately.
ur roaming pack is a scam. paid 499 daily and got speeds slower than 2G. cant even load maps properly abroad. what exactly am i paying for. plz explain

The recharge plan comparison feature in the app is genuinely helpful for making informed decisions. I can see exactly what each plan offers in terms of data, validity, OTT access, and pricing side by side. This transparency is appreciated and helps me pick the best value for my specific usage pattern every cycle.
Average pricing. Neither cheap nor expensive for the market.

The billing process for postpaid plans is straightforward on this carrier. Charges are listed clearly, due date notifications come through the app, and payment works through standard channels. No hidden fees observed but also nothing that distinguishes it from other carriers.
Internet speed is decent for browsing. Adequate for daily tasks.

Really good recharge plan with excellent value. The OTT bundle is comprehensive and the data allocation is generous for the price. Combined with reliable network coverage and clear call quality this represents everything I need from a mobile carrier in one package.
Helpful support staff. Answered all my questions patiently.

The app provides comprehensive roaming information for every country including partner networks, expected speeds, and pricing breakdowns. This transparency helped me plan my international trip budget accurately. I knew exactly what to expect before landing and there were zero surprises on the bill.
Billing transparency is acceptable. Charges are listed.

The pricing structure is confusing with too many plan variants that differ only slightly. It takes significant effort to compare and decide which recharge plan offers the best value. They should simplify the lineup to maybe five or six clearly differentiated tiers instead of twenty overlapping options.
Data validity is good on quarterly plan. 84 days works.

The 5G plan delivers real value for money with fast internet speeds and comprehensive OTT bundle. Network coverage is solid in my metro area and the billing has been flawless for the eight months I have been on this plan. Exactly what was advertised.
Happy with the value I get for the price. Satisfactory service.
Customer support takes too long to respond. Needs improvement.
OTT bundle works as expected. Standard streaming quality on mobile.
ur app is so buggy cant even complete a reacharg without it freezing. lost money twice because transaction failed but amount got debited. worst mobile app experience in telecom

Really good value for money on the family plan. Four connections sharing a pool of data with individual OTT access for each member. Billing is consolidated and clear. Customer support helped set it all up quickly. Overall a positive experience worth recommending.

The 5G experience is transformative for my work from home setup. Video conferences are lag-free, downloads are instant, and the connection is rock solid throughout the day. Worth every penny of the premium plan.
Value for money is debatable. Depends on how much OTT you use.
App is functional. Does what I need for basic account management.
Could be better. Could be worse. It is what it is.
I am really disappointed with the call quality lately. Keeps breaking up during important calls.
Customer care accessible through multiple channels. Standard options.

Customer support chat feature in the app is very convenient. I resolved my data balance query without making a single phone call. The bot handled the initial screening and a human agent took over smoothly when needed. Modern and efficient system.
Value for money is okay I guess. Nothing to rave about.
SIM activation process is acceptable. Standard 48 hour timeline.
Inconsistent network coverage on my daily commute. Calls drop twice a day on the metro.
No strong feelings. It is a phone plan.

The internet speed and data balance both work as advertised on this plan. I have monitored my usage carefully for two billing cycles and everything checks out accurately. The data validity window aligns well with my recharge schedule so there is no wastage.

v bad that the ott bundle doesnt carry over if u recharge a day late. missed my renewal by one day and lost all my streaming access. had to reactivate everything manually. punishing custmers for small delays is not ok

Internet speed has degraded noticeably over the past two months in my locality. I used to consistently get 80 Mbps but now it hovers around 15 to 20 Mbps during most of the day. Data balance drains faster too which suggests background processes are consuming more due to retries on the slow connection.

The customer support interaction I had yesterday was beyond frustrating. Called about a simple billing query and was transferred between four departments over ninety minutes. Each agent asked me to verify my identity from scratch and none had access to notes from previous agents. A basic question took half a day to resolve.
Network coverage is average. Internet speed and calls are standard.

The customer support experience was mixed. The first agent was unhelpful and dismissive but after I requested escalation the supervisor was excellent. Resolved my billing dispute on the spot and credited the overcharged amount within minutes. Leadership makes a difference.

Happy with the overall value I receive from this carrier. The combination of fast internet, good OTT access, and competitive pricing makes it easy to stay loyal. The recharge plans keep improving incrementally and the billing is always transparent. Solid carrier.
Internet speed is reasonable. Gets the job done without issues.

The annual recharge plan has been outstanding value for my family. At 2999 rupees for 365 days we get generous daily data, unlimited calls, and full OTT access. The billing is just once a year which eliminates monthly recharge hassle. For households on a budget this is the most economical option available.
Meh. Works.
Data balance seems accurate. Normal consumption patterns reflected.

The mobile app has a great feature that shows real-time roaming usage and remaining balance in the international pack. This helped me manage my data consumption abroad without fear of bill shock. The interface clearly separates domestic and roaming usage which is thoughtful design.
cant blv the intrenet speed is this bad in 2024. my old 3G connection was faster than this garbage. fix ur infrastructure
tbh the value for money depends on which plan you pick. lower plans have zero ott and poor data. but the 599 and above are genuinely competitive with good streaming access and enough data
OTT bundle quality is disappointing. Only 480p streaming available.

The roaming auto-activation feature is a lifesaver for frequent travelers. I set my preferences once in the app and every time I cross borders my international pack activates automatically without me having to do anything manually. Brilliant feature that saves hassle every trip.

prblm with ott bundle is the quality. netflix only gives 480p mobile plan which looks terrible even on a large phone screen. for a plan costing 499 they should at least give hd access. not value for money at all
tbh ok sim activation experience. not fast not slow. took about 2 days which is average for the industry i guess. nothing to complain but nothing to praise
v bad billing. charged for services I never subscribed.
